tasks.label: Agent 1: Route Dropdown
args:
You are executing Step 1 of Plan #193 (Revamp Dog Walk Summary). Read .claude/plans/193-revamp-dog-walk-summary.md first for full context. Also read .claude/agents/compose-ui-specialist.md for domain-specific conventions and patterns.

Your task: ROUTE DROPDOWN REFACTOR

Rewrite RouteTagSelector from FlowRow FilterChips to ExposedDropdownMenuBox.

Files in scope:
- ui/dogwalk/RouteTagSelector.kt - Rewrite to dropdown
- ui/dogwalk/DogWalkSummaryScreen.kt - Update RouteTagSelector usage
- ui/dogwalk/DogWalkSummaryViewModel.kt - Simplify route tag state

Requirements:
- Dropdown shows all route tags sorted by lastUsed DESC
- Auto-detected route is pre-selected (already wired via preSelectedRouteTag)
- Placeholder text: 'No route detected' when null
- Bottom item: '+ New Route' triggers inline text field or dialog to add a new tag
- Small 'auto-detected' hint text below the Route label when preSelectedRouteTag is non-null
- Remove isCreatingNewTag/newTagName from screen props, simplify the API
- Keep confirmNewTag logic for the + New Route dialog

Only work on these files. Do NOT modify files outside your scope. When done, commit your changes with a descriptive message.

tasks.label: Agent 2: Weather API + Data Layer
args:
You are executing Steps 2 and 3 of Plan #193 (Revamp Dog Walk Summary). Read .claude/plans/193-revamp-dog-walk-summary.md first for full context. Also read .claude/agents/room-specialist.md for Room/database conventions.

Your task: WEATHER API INFRASTRUCTURE + DATA LAYER EXTENSION

Part A - Weather API (Step 2):
- app/build.gradle.kts - Add Retrofit 2.9.0, OkHttp 4.12.0, Moshi 1.15.0 dependencies
- data/remote/WeatherApiService.kt - New Retrofit interface for OpenWeatherMap Current Weather API
- data/remote/WeatherResponse.kt - New data class mapping OpenWeatherMap JSON response
- data/model/WeatherData.kt - New domain model: tempF (Int), condition (String), iconCode (String), windSpeedMph (Int), humidity (Int), plus mapping functions to WeatherCondition and WeatherTemp enums
- di/NetworkModule.kt - New Hilt @Module providing OkHttp client, Moshi, Retrofit, WeatherApiService
- data/repository/WeatherRepository.kt - New repo: fetchWeather(lat, lon) -> Result<WeatherData>
- API key: Read from BuildConfig.OPENWEATHER_API_KEY (add buildConfigField in build.gradle.kts reading from local.properties)
- Endpoint: api.openweathermap.org/data/2.5/weather?lat={lat}&lon={lon}&units=imperial&appid={key}

Part B - Data Layer Extension (Step 3):
- data/local/entity/WorkoutEntity.kt - Add nullable fields: weatherTempF (Int?), weatherWindMph (Int?), weatherHumidity (Int?), weatherDescription (String?)
- data/local/AppDatabase.kt - Bump version, add Room migration adding 4 nullable columns
- data/repository/WorkoutSaveManager.kt - Extend updateDogWalkMetadata() to accept and persist new weather fields
- data/sync/FirestoreSync.kt - Include new fields in Firestore push (backwards compatible, nullable)

Key decisions:
- Map condition string to WeatherCondition enum: Clear/Sunny -> SUNNY, Clouds -> CLOUDY, Rain/Drizzle/Thunderstorm -> RAINY, Snow -> SNOWY, Wind conditions -> WINDY
- Map temp to WeatherTemp: >85 HOT, >70 WARM, >55 MILD, >40 COOL, <=40 COLD
- Keep existing enum columns for backwards compatibility

Only work on these files. Do NOT modify UI files. When done, commit your changes with a descriptive message.

tasks.label: Agent 3: Photo Attachments
args:
You are executing Step 5 of Plan #193 (Revamp Dog Walk Summary). Read .claude/plans/193-revamp-dog-walk-summary.md first for full context. Also read .claude/agents/compose-ui-specialist.md and .claude/agents/room-specialist.md for domain conventions.

Your task: PHOTO ATTACHMENT FEATURE

Data layer:
- data/local/entity/WalkPhotoEntity.kt - New Room entity: id (String, PK), workoutId (String), filePath (String), createdAt (Long). Add index on workoutId.
- data/local/WorkoutDao.kt - Add methods: insertWalkPhoto, getPhotosForWorkout(workoutId), deleteWalkPhoto(id), deletePhotosForWorkout(workoutId)
- data/local/AppDatabase.kt - Add WalkPhotoEntity to entities list (coordinate migration version with Agent 2 if needed - use version bump + additive migration)
- data/repository/WorkoutRepository.kt - Add photo CRUD wrapper methods

UI layer:
- ui/dogwalk/PhotoGrid.kt - New composable: horizontal FlowRow of 80x80dp photo thumbnails with rounded corners. Last item is a dashed-border '+ ADD' button. Use AsyncImage (Coil) for thumbnails. Accept list of photo URIs and onAddPhoto/onRemovePhoto callbacks.
- ui/dogwalk/DogWalkSummaryViewModel.kt - Add photo state: photos list, addPhoto(uri) copies to internal storage filesDir/walk_photos/<workoutId>/, removePhoto(id), persist on save
- ui/dogwalk/DogWalkSummaryScreen.kt - Add PhotoGrid section between Energy Level and Notes. Use rememberLauncherForActivityResult with PickVisualMedia for the photo picker.

Key details:
- Use Android PickVisualMedia (Photo Picker API) - ActivityResultContracts.PickVisualMedia()
- Copy selected images to app internal storage (context.filesDir/walk_photos/<workoutId>/)
- Generate UUID for each photo filename
- Photos stored locally only (no Firebase upload in this PR)
- Check if Coil is already in dependencies; if not, add coil-compose dependency

Only work on files in your scope. Do NOT modify weather-related files. When done, commit your changes with a descriptive message.
